title: Dice.fm Events Scraper
description: Scrape events from Dice.fm. Provide a Dice.fm URL, or use keyword/location to discover events. Supports browse, event, artist, and venue pages.

url.title: Dice.fm URL
url.description: Paste any Dice.fm URL (browse, event, artist, or venue page).

results_wanted.title: Max Results
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of events to collect.

max_pages.title: Max Pages
max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to visit (pagination limit).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Configure Apify Proxy (recommended for large runs or to avoid rate limiting).
